props.name: keyboardHint
props.type: ReactNode on Tabs.List; null, false, or empty content suppresses output

nativePolicy: Tab, tablist, and tabpanel relationships are owned by React Aria with stable string keys.
Automatic and manual activation, horizontal and vertical orientation, disabled keys, and RTL spatial arrows are explicit.
Optional href values support URL-state recipes but reject empty or executable protocols.
Tabs.List keyboardHint optionally contributes visible discovery copy and the tablist accessible description; omitting it or passing null, false, or empty content removes both outputs.
